calendar.matters:
Mo To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Disco
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is DENIED AS MOOT. THE RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported. (610/BEC)
